logical_role: Prepares vehicle and scenario input data
comment: Organizes and validates scenario-level inputs before risk evaluation
Supports vehicle concept comparison and selection

logical_role: Calculates stopping distance using speed friction and delay assumptions
Calculates time to collision from distance and relative speed
Classifies the current risk state using stopping distance and TTC
comment: Outputs SAFE CAUTION WARNING or EMERGENCY_BRAKE

logical_role: Generates brake request based on the warning state
comment: Brake request is generated only in EMERGENCY_BRAKE state
Supports physical architecture selection at concept level

logical_role: Checks outputs against requirement pass rules
comment: Produces scenario pass or fail results
